reference: Hello, this is obviously a whiplash injury. If there is only minor pain and muscle spasm, that should resolve in a few days with some ibuprofen and rest. That said, since I cannot examine you, it would be a good idea to have a doctor check you out.
text: Hello, this is obviously a whiplash engine. If there is only minor pain and muscle spasms, that should resolve in a few days with some ibuprofen and rest. That said, since I cannot examine you, it would be a good idea to have a doctor check you out.
